Math.round(p*rate*Math.pow(1+rate,m)/(Math.pow(1+rate,m)-1));}const EMPTY={customer:'',vehicle:'',type:'Purchase',salePrice:'',tradeIn:'0',downPayment:'',rate:'7.0',term:'60',status:'Desking'};export
